title: paeonia arietina
intro: Paeonia arietina is a type of perennial plant belonging to the genus Paeonia, commonly known as the 'White Lamb's Ears' due to its woolly, white-haired leaves. Traditionally, the roots and rhizomes of Paeonia arietina have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. Paeonia arietina is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
